nasb.text: Then Jehoiada made a covenant between himself and all the people and the king, that they would be the Lord’s people.

esv.text: And Jehoiada made a covenant between himself and all the people and the king that they should be the Lord’s people.

cnv.text: 耶何耶大與眾民和王立約，要他們作耶和華的子民。

ccb.text: 耶何耶大让民众和王与他一起立约，要做耶和华的子民。
